headline: Marathon Petroleum Corp (NYSE:MPC) Passes the Screen for Reliable Dividend Growth
summary: A reliable dividend strategy avoids yield traps. This article explains how Marathon Petroleum (MPC) passes a screen for dividend stocks with strong health, profitability, and sustainable payout growth.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Marathon Petroleum, Raises Price Target to $284
summary: Mizuho  analyst Nitin Kumar   maintains Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $224 to $284.
